stemHtml: When must a runway lineup correction be applied to take-off performance figures?

options.a: A correction is not required when the take-off is not field length limited.
options.b: When the aircraft fuselage length exceeds a certain limit.
options.c: Any time positioning of the aircraft on the runway does not permit the aircraft to start the takeoff roll at the start of the threshold.
options.d: When the runway has an upslope.
